prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别为约6171名、6189名、6344名、6769名、5901名。2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势，2025年出现明显回升（较2024年前移约868名），波动较大。2025年基准位次约5901名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为65人，2024–2025年缩减至60人；2026年计划仍为60人（与2025年持平），未进一步扩招或缩招。在考生总数持续增长的背景下，计划持平意味着相对竞争压力加大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国人民解放军国防科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属中央军委，是军事类院校中唯一的985高校，办学层次极高。软科排名未进入前200名（军事类院校不参与主榜排名），但学校在国防科技领域的特殊地位和声誉无可替代；该校在声誉舆情、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现明显负面或正面信号，说明近年报考舆论环境相对平稳，未见大规模断档或爆冷事件。军事类院校的特殊性使其报考群体相对稳定；该校在系统科学、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息与通信工程、航空宇航科学与技术、管理科学与工程等学科具有突出优势（第四轮学科评估多个A类学科），与招生专业高度匹配，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，社会关注度极高；自动化类、航空航天类相关专业热度也处于偏热水平。山东省2026年考生总数约72万人，较2025年（约68.1万）增加约3.9万人（增幅约5.7%），竞争基数扩大。省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在441–444分区间，未出现大幅波动；该校校本部位于湖南省长沙市，在山东省招生规模较大（2025年综合类60人），属于跨省招生。山东省考生对军事类院校的报考意愿受政审、体检等特殊要求影响，整体报考群体相对固定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回升至5901名的基准、2026年招生计划持平、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%导致竞争加剧、计算机/电子信息类专业持续高热吸引高分考生等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约6081名，区间5581–6581名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（天河拔尖班）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、网络工程、信息安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程、微电子科学与工程等）
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程、人工智能）
- 理论与应用力学（航天力学拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 航空航天类（航空航天工程、飞行器动力工程、材料科学与工程）
- 大气科学类（大气科学、气象技术与工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（5581–6581名）内，建议以二档专业（电子信息类、自动化类）为主攻方向，一档专业（天河拔尖班、计算机类）作为冲刺，三档专业（航空航天类、大气科学类）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如5500名以内）可重点冲刺天河拔尖班和计算机类王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were approximately 6171, 6189, 6344, 6769, and 5901 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of moving backward year by year, but in 2025, there was a significant rebound (moving forward by about 868 places compared to 2024), with large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5901. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province: from 2021 to 2023, it was 65 students each year, and from 2024 to 2025, it was reduced to 60 students. The plan for 2026 remains at 60 students (same as 2025), with no further expansion or reduction. Against the backdrop of a continuous increase in the total number of examinees, a stable plan means relatively increased competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The National University of Defense Technology of the People's Liberation Army is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, subordinate to the Central Military Commission. It is the only 985 university among military academies, with an extremely high level of education. The Soft Science ranking does not place it in the top 200 (military academies do not participate in the main ranking), but the school's special status and reputation in the field of national defense science and technology are irreplaceable. The school has not shown any obvious negative or positive signals in reputation public opinion, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, indicating that the application environment in recent years has been relatively stable, with no large-scale gaps or cold events. The special nature of military academies makes the applicant group relatively stable. The school has outstanding advantages in disciplines such as systems science, computer science and technology, software engineering, information and communication engineering, aerospace science and technology, and management science and engineering (multiple A-class disciplines in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), which highly match the enrollment majors and strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors have been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with extremely high social attention. Automation, aerospace-related majors are also at a relatively hot level. The total number of examinees in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (about 5.7%) compared to 2025 (about 681,000), expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (ordinary class first segment) has been stable in the range of 441–444 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. The university's main campus is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and it has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shandong Province (60 comprehensive students in 2025), which is a cross-provincial enrollment. The willingness of Shandong candidates to apply for military academies is affected by special requirements such as political review and physical examination, making the overall applicant group relatively fixed.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 5901 in 2025, the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the increase in the total number of examinees in Shandong Province by about 5.7% leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of computer/electronic information majors attracting high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6081, with a range of 5581–6581.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Tianhe Top Class)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Network Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation Category (Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Theoretical and Applied Mechanics (Aerospace Mechanics Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Aerospace Category (Aerospace Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering)
- Atmospheric Science Category (Atmospheric Science, Meteorological Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (5581–6581), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Automation Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Tianhe Top Class, Computer Category) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Aerospace Category, Atmospheric Science Category) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 5500), you can focus on sprinting for the Tianhe Top Class and the flagship Computer Category majors.

_translation.university_name_en: National University of Defense Technology of the People's Liberation Army
